title: pleopeltis tico
intro: Pleopeltis tico, also known as the Tico polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to Central America, specifically in Costa Rica and Panama. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Tico polypody is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, improving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into teas or infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, or dried and used in traditional medicine.
